funFacts: Historically, the Kawaii Animal Party has captured the imagination of artists, scientists, and educators alike.
Designed for Hard difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using wax crayons or markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about advanced mechanical structure and shapes while developing fine motor coordination.
